personalInfo.name: Eng. Eslam Ahmed Office for Engineering Services & Training
personalInfo.title: Civil Engineer | Structural Design Engineer
personalInfo.description: SCE Certified Civil Engineer with 6+ years of experience in structural design, site supervision, and technical office engineering.
personalInfo.about: A smart and energetic civil engineer with wide knowledge and experience in construction supervising, structural engineering, and technical office work. Passionate about delivering high-quality structural solutions and sharing knowledge through teaching engineering courses.
highlights: Structural Design Engineer and Lecturer at ENSKIIPA
6 years of experience in the labor market and teaching
Designed numerous projects inside and outside Egypt
Trained 12,000 students and graduates over the past years
Founder and owner of Eslam Ahmed Office for Engineering Services

services.title: Structural Design
services.description: Designing structural systems for buildings including villas, high-rise buildings, hospitals, mosques, and industrial structures.

services.title: Site Supervision
services.description: Supervising construction activities, managing pipe racks, structures, and site excavation operations.

services.title: Technical Office Engineering
services.description: Preparing shop drawings, quantity take-offs, and detailed drawings for beams, columns, slabs, and footings.

services.title: Engineering Courses
services.description: Lecturing in structural design, reinforced concrete, AutoCAD, and shop drawing courses.

projects.title: Villa
projects.description: Full structural design for residential villa including all structural elements and reinforcement details.

projects.title: High Rise Building
projects.description: Full structural design including system selection, reinforcement layouts, and element design for all floors.

projects.title: Elevated Tank
projects.description: Structural design and analysis for an elevated water tank.

projects.title: Rectangular Halls
projects.description: Full structural design for rectangular hall system including reinforcement layouts and structural element details.

projects.title: Wedding Hall — Radial Frame System
projects.description: Structural design for wedding hall using radial frame system.

projects.title: Factory — 2-Hinged Frame System
projects.description: Industrial factory structural design using 2-hinged frame system with full structural analysis.

projects.title: Mosque Project
projects.description: Complete structural design for mosque including dome and minaret structural systems.

downloadableProjects.title: HOSPITAL-1
downloadableProjects.description: Complete structural design project for a hospital (Model 1), including structural drawings and detailed reinforcement layouts.

downloadableProjects.title: MALL-2
downloadableProjects.description: Structural design project for a commercial center (Mall), showing systems for columns, voided slabs, and foundation designs.

downloadableProjects.title: Tall Building
downloadableProjects.description: Structural design project for a high-rise tower with wind and seismic load analysis and lateral load-resisting system design.

downloadableProjects.title: Administrative Building - 3
downloadableProjects.description: Complete structural design project for an administrative building, including reinforcement details and load distributions.

downloadableProjects.title: Complete Hospital Project
downloadableProjects.description: Comprehensive structural design and analysis project for a hospital, including all details for slabs, columns, beams, and foundations.

courses.title: Civil Auto-cad
courses.description: One of the most essential courses for any civil engineer. It is considered the foundation of our work in both design and technical office fields. All shop drawings that are executed on-site are produced from this software. If you want to enter a reinforced concrete or structural graduation project, or work in design or technical office fields, you must first start learning this software as it's the base upon which all your next steps are built.
targetAudience: This course is exclusively for civil engineering students and engineers
The course is suitable for execution engineers and technical office engineers
Suitable for fresh graduates and students
The course is suitable for design engineers and beginners
Suitable for graduation project students (Concrete and Structural)
drawings: Axes and Columns Drawing
Foundations Drawing
Columns Sections Drawing
Foundations Sections Drawing
Beams Sections Drawing
Stairs Sections Drawing
Solid Slab Drawing
Flat Slab Drawing
Hollow Block Slab Drawing
Paneled Beams Slab Drawing
Converting Architectural System to Structural System

faqs.question: Does the course include manual explanations?
faqs.answer: Yes indeed, the course includes very important manual explanations for some parts that will help you understand the basics of drafting on AutoCAD.

faqs.question: How many hours is the course?
faqs.answer: The course duration is 33 hours, consisting of 11 lectures and 39 videos, explained over a month and a half.

faqs.question: Is the course a set of recorded videos?
faqs.answer: Yes indeed, the course consists of high quality 1080p recorded videos.

faqs.question: How is the follow-up done?
faqs.answer: Trainees are added to a WhatsApp group, and there is daily follow-up by a full customer service team to continuously assist you, as well as the instructor to answer all your questions daily.

outcomes: You will be fully qualified to enter the structural design field
You will have the full experience and ability to read architectural drawings
You will have the full experience and ability to create a balanced structural system
You will have the full experience and ability to arrange columns in the structural system
You will have the full experience and ability to place beams in the structural system
You will have the full experience and ability to choose the appropriate slab type
If you are a student, the course will help you pass the graduation project with excellence
benefits: You will be added to our platform which has many advantages
You will receive all explanation materials (projects library + structural drawings + explanation books)
You will receive a certificate of course completion after passing 80% of the tasks
We will teach you how to market yourself correctly by creating a strong CV and Portfolio
Daily follow-up, which is the most important point, as the instructor and customer service follow up with you daily to solve all your problems
The instructor holds a Zoom meeting with you once a week to review everything done during the week and answer your questions
We provide the software to test and check your level
Tasks of each trainee are evaluated through the Facebook group

content.subject: Sections Of Column and Walls & Foundation
Sections of Beams & Section of Stairs

courses.title: CSI DIPLOMA
courses.description: The Structural Design Diploma is a comprehensive professional course in structural design of concrete structures. It includes manual explanations and practical applications on designing multiple projects using various design programs. This diploma is widely popular and most common in the Gulf countries and the Middle East.
targetAudience: This course is exclusively for civil engineering students and engineers
No prior experience or knowledge of any software is required as we start from scratch
The course is suitable for design engineers and beginners
Suitable for graduation project students (Concrete and Foundations)
drawings: Braced and unbraced columns
Dropped, hidden, inverted, circular, and broken beams with stairs
Solid Slab
Flat Slab
Hollow Block Slab
Paneled Beams Slab
Stairs of all types (Helical – two Flight – Three Flight)
Foundations of all types (Strip – Raft – Combined – Isolated)
Retaining walls
Shear walls
Core
End gables
Tank elements (Shaft – Cone - Lower cone - Walls - Dome)
Transfer Beam
Ramps
projects: Project 1: Residential Villa under gravity loads only
Project 2: Residential Tower under lateral loads (Earthquakes + Wind + Gravity)
Project 3: Hospital under lateral loads (Earthquakes + Wind + Gravity)
Project 4: Coverings - Hinged Frame under (M + N)
Project 5: Coverings - Radial Frame under (M + N)

faqs.question: Does the diploma include manual explanations?
faqs.answer: Yes indeed, the diploma includes very important manual explanations for some parts that will help you understand the basics of drafting and analysis on structural software.

faqs.question: How many hours is the diploma?
faqs.answer: The diploma duration is 92 hours, consisting of 37 lectures and 138 videos, explained over 3 months.

faqs.question: Is the diploma a set of recorded videos?
faqs.answer: Yes indeed, the diploma consists of high quality 1080p recorded videos.

faqs.question: How is the follow-up done?
faqs.answer: Trainees are added to a WhatsApp group, and there is daily follow-up by a full customer service team to continuously assist you, as well as the instructor to answer all your questions daily.

outcomes: You will be fully qualified to work as a structural design engineer in consulting offices or as a freelancer
You will have the full experience and ability to prepare structural designs professionally up to drawing extraction, printing, and calculation note preparation
You will be proficient in all software used in structural design
If you are a student, the course will help you pass the graduation project (Reinforced Concrete) with excellence
benefits: You will receive all software used in the diploma with installation guides
You will receive all study materials (such as projects library + Excel sheets + structural drawings + explanation books)
You will receive a certificate of course completion after passing 80% of the tasks
We will teach you how to market yourself correctly by creating a strong CV and Portfolio
Daily follow-up, which is the most important point, as the instructor and customer service follow up with you daily to solve all your problems
The instructor holds a Zoom meeting with you once a week to review everything done during the week and answer your questions
We perform a test after each software to check your level
Tasks of each trainee are evaluated through the Facebook group
checks: Check Punching for Flat Slab and All footings
Check Shear Stress and Torsion for beams
Check center of mass and center of Rigidity

courses.title: Manual Design
courses.description: The Manual Structural Foundation Course is a comprehensive professional course for manual structural design of building elements, in addition to learning the principles of manual detailing and drafting of reinforcement (manual shop drawing). Our main goal of the course is to establish the civil engineer by teaching manual design.
targetAudience: This course is exclusively for civil engineering students and engineers
The course is suitable for execution and technical office engineers
The course is suitable for design engineers and beginners
Suitable for graduation project students (Concrete and Foundations)
drawings: Detailed review of structural analysis and load paths
Calculation of internal forces, equilibrium and its equations for different sections
Design of concrete beams of all types (Dropped, Hidden, Inverted, Circular, Broken)
Reinforcement detailing of beams and checks for Shear and Torsion
Design of short and slender columns, load calculation and short/spiral columns equations
Reinforcement detailing of columns, bar layout, starter bars length, and Buckling checks
Design and detailing of Solid Slabs, load distribution and thickness calculation
Design and detailing of Flat Slabs, and Drop Panel and Column Head details
Calculation of additional reinforcement, chairs, and Flat Slabs Punching check
Design and detailing of Hollow Block Slabs, ribs details, and block distribution
Design and detailing of Paneled Beams Slabs
Design and detailing of Stairs of all types (two flights, 3 flights, and Helical Stairs)
Design of Isolated, Combined, and Strip footings
Design of Strap footings (neighbor) and Raft Foundations
Design and detailing of semels, medas, strap beams, and their relations with columns/foundations
Calculation of wind and earthquake loads, static and dynamic analysis methods
Design and detailing of Shear Walls and Core

faqs.question: Does the course rely on manual explanations?
faqs.answer: Yes indeed, the course is completely dedicated to manual design and reinforcement detailing to establish the civil engineer from scratch.

faqs.question: How many hours is the course?
faqs.answer: The course duration is 66 hours, consisting of 11 lectures and 146 videos.

faqs.question: Is the course a set of recorded videos?
faqs.answer: Yes indeed, the course consists of high quality 1080p recorded videos.

faqs.question: How is the follow-up done?
faqs.answer: Trainees are added to a WhatsApp group, and there is daily follow-up by a full customer service team to continuously assist you, as well as the instructor to answer all your questions daily.

outcomes: You will be fully qualified to work as a structural design engineer in consulting offices or as a freelancer
You will have the full experience and ability to prepare structural designs professionally and produce manual shop drawings and calculation notes
You will be proficient in designing all structural elements manually and detailing reinforcement
If you are a student, the course will help you pass the graduation project (Reinforced Concrete) with excellence
benefits: You will be added to our platform which has many advantages
You will receive all study materials (such as projects library + Excel sheets + structural drawings + explanation books)
You will receive a certificate of course completion after passing 80% of the tasks
We will teach you how to market yourself correctly by creating a strong CV and Portfolio
Daily follow-up, which is the most important point, as the instructor and customer service follow up with you daily to solve all your problems
The instructor holds a Zoom meeting with you once a week to review everything done during the week and answer your questions
We perform a test after each section to check your level
Tasks of each trainee are evaluated through the Facebook group
checks: Check Punching for Flat Slab and All footings
Check Shear Stress and Torsion for beams
Check center of mass and center of Rigidity
